fix_plan.expected_effect: Eliminates docroot Permission denied and the 510-case /index.html redirect-cycle 500 cluster.
fix_plan.fix: Move verified NGINX Full-Matrix harness roots out from under /root or avoid overriding NGINX_HARNESS_WORK_ROOT with BUILD_ROOT/tmp.

fix_plan.expected_effect: Classifies future inaccessible-docroot evidence as BLOCKED instead of runtime FAIL.
fix_plan.fix: Add a readiness/permission preflight that blocks NGINX jobs when worker user cannot traverse DOCROOT parents.

fix_plan.expected_effect: Provides minimal repro without rerunning the 524-case NGINX job.
fix_plan.fix: Add a verified single-case Full-Matrix target for NGINX with CRS/MRTS setup and job metadata.

metadata.generated_notice: Generated file - do not edit manually.

minimal_repro.notes: The connector harness supports TEST_CASE internally, but the verified full-matrix path does not yet expose a single-case target with CRS/MRTS setup and isolated job metadata.
minimal_repro.status: reproduced_by_full_matrix_evidence; direct single-case target needs a stable full-matrix wrapper

no_invented_values_statement: All counts and examples are parsed from the verified NGINX with-crs/with-mrts job.json, JSONL result file, and referenced per-case logs.
